title: メジロマックイーン登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen and I have begun our foray into
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To become a racer worthy of the noble Mejiro
family name, she sets the goal of conquering the
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first step of preparing for the Tenno Sho is to
win her upcoming debut race.
